title: Up in Arms
writer: Don Hartman, Allen Boretz, Robert Pirosh
actors: Danny Kaye, Dana Andrews, Dinah Shore
plot: Hypochondriac Danny Weems gets drafted into the army and makes life miserable for his fellow GIs. He's also lovesick when it comes to pretty Mary Morgan, unaware that she's in love with his best friend Joe.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 1 win & 2 nominations total
